message:
Implement configurable health check methods (rust_proxy-78m)

- Modify check_proxy_health() to accept HealthCheckTarget parameter
- Add check_proxy_with_target() dispatcher for CONNECT vs GET methods
- Update check_proxy_connect() to use configurable host:port target
- Add check_proxy_get() for HTTP GET health checks with HTTPS tunnel support
- Update all call sites in main.rs to pass health_check_target from config
- Supports both "CONNECT host:port" and "GET url" health check methods

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
